voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Cường ngồi trong bóng tối và chờ. Chờ bình minh. Chờ câu hỏi tiếp theo. Chờ khoảnh khắc anh đủ can đảm để đứng lên, bước ra khỏi hầm, đi 1.2 km đến bệnh viện, và đối mặt với người mà anh đã biến thành công cụ.
voice_adherence.fix: Cut this passage entirely. It explains what Cường will do and why, violating the voice's core principle of surgical observation. Replace with a single physical detail — his hand touching the paper, or the ping on the screen — that implies the decision without stating it.
voice_adherence.note: The voice profile demands cold, technician-like observation with emotion emerging through wrong details, not declarations. Most of the chapter executes this well — the body-temperature tracking, the ping readouts, the sensory-specific descriptions of the tunnel and hầm. But the final third slides into explicit emotional narration ('anh đang bắt đầu hành trình đi theo chiều ngược lại') that breaks the phẫu thuật tone. The exemplar passage never tells us Cường feels trapped — it shows him touching a bruise and noting the exact temperature. This chapter should trust the same technique.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: The entire sequence of Cường returning to the hầm, sitting with the paper, and trying to remember Lan is narrated rather than dramatized. We're told he 'cố nhớ' and 'cố gọi lại' multiple times, but we never see a specific memory-attempt fail in a concrete, visceral way.
beat_coverage.fix: Dramatize at least one specific attempt to remember — he closes his eyes, tries to call up Lan's face, and instead gets a fragment of Phố Hoa Sữa (the wrong memory intruding). Show the wrong memory arriving in sensory detail before he can stop it. This makes the failure a scene event, not a summary statement.
beat_coverage.note: Beat 1 (Bảo refusing to help) is the strongest section — fully dramatized with dialogue, physical detail, and earned tension. Beat 2 (finding the paper) is present but the discovery feels convenient; the cardboard box hasn't been established before. Beat 3 (not remembering Lan) is the weakest — it repeats the same 'nhiễu' description without escalation. Beat 4 (sitting in darkness) is overlong and drifts into telling.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Bảo's dialogue in the tunnel is strong, but his final line — 'Đi về. Đợi. Chết. Hoặc không chết. Tao không quan tâm. Mày đã tự đào mồ — tự leo ra đi.' — feels slightly too composed for someone described as speaking in 3-5 word bursts who 'hay ngắt người khác để bảo ngừng nói.'
character_voice.fix: Break Bảo's exit into shorter, more interrupted speech. Let him start sentences and abandon them. Example: 'Đi về.' Bảo quay lưng. 'Đợi. Hoặc...' Anh ta dừng. Xoa thái dương. 'Tự leo ra đi.' This better matches his established pattern of truncated, defensive speech.
character_voice.note: Cường's internal voice is mostly consistent with the profile — short sentences, technical vocabulary, body-before-emotion. The best moments are when he notes specific temperatures and heart rates. Bảo's voice is differentiated but slightly too eloquent in his longer speech. The chapter has no dialogue from other characters, so range is limited.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The paper reading 'Lan. Phòng 4. St. Vincent.' is planted effectively as a physical object, but the chapter over-explains its significance. Lines like 'Mảnh giấy là cầu nối. Giữa những gì anh từng biết và những gì anh đã mất' do the reader's interpretive work for them.
plants_seeded.fix: Cut the explanatory paragraph about the paper being a 'cầu nối.' Let Cường's actions — carrying it to the desk, placing it beside the keyboard, staring at it in the dark — communicate its importance. Trust the physical detail to carry symbolic weight.
plants_seeded.note: The Bảo warning from Ch 4 is resolved naturally — his fear is made visceral through the detail of 'nó đứng đó. Không nhúc nhích. Không chớp mắt' in his blind eye. This is well-executed. The name 'Lan' is seeded as a mystery element effectively. The weakest aspect is the chapter's insistence on explaining what these plants mean rather than letting them sit as questions.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Và Cường — kẻ đã quên tên con đường mình sống, quên mùa hiện tại, quên lý do trốn chạy — lần đầu tiên nắm giữ một mảnh vỡ ký ức thật sự.
prose_quality.fix: Cut entirely. This sentence summarizes what the chapter has already shown through the paper discovery. It's redundant and breaks the cold observational voice. If you need a beat here, use a physical action: Cường đặt mảnh giấy xuống bàn. Ngón tay anh còn ướt — mực nhạt dính vào da.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Bảo nheo mắt phải. Tay trái anh ta bấm liên tục vào ngón cái, nhịp đều như đồng hồ đo nhịp tim.
prose_quality.note: The prose is strongest in the tunnel scene — concrete, sensory, specific. It weakens progressively as the chapter continues, with the final third relying on abstract statements ('hành trình đi theo chiều ngược lại,' 'mảnh vỡ ký ức thật sự') rather than physical detail. Sentence variety is decent but several paragraphs in the hầm section follow the same pattern: short declaration → elaboration → emotional summary. The voice's prescribed rhythm (action: short/tactile: long/pain: fragmented) is followed in the first half but abandoned in the second.

continuity.note: Strong continuity from Ch 14. Cường's emotional state — the revelation that he is the abuser, not the victim — carries forward authentically. The vết xước on his chest tracking at 37.5-37.8°C and nhịp 54 is consistent. His seeking out Bảo makes sense given his desperation. The detail that Bảo hasn't spoken to him in a while is implied but could be clearer. The one minor issue: Cường seems to have left police custody between chapters without explanation, though this may be addressed in a scene I haven't seen.

violations: Minor: Bảo's speech patterns are slightly more verbose than the 3-5 word guideline in characters.md, though this is a soft rather than hard rule.

Minor: The chapter states Cường has lived in the hầm 'hai năm — hoặc ba năm, hoặc năm năm,' but canon says he stole the Neural Mantle in 2039 and it's now 2041, suggesting approximately two years. This uncertainty may be intentional (showing memory fragmentation) but could be tighter.
canon_compliance.note: No major canon violations. The Cumberland tunnel description matches established lore (dark, no sanitation, cable-strewn, high death rate). Bảo's blindness and scarring are consistent. The hầm dimensions and sensory details are accurate. The connection between Bệnh nhân 04-ĐM and 'Phòng 4' / 'Lan' is logically sound.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The Cumberland tunnel scene uses the setting effectively (sensory details, the corpse in the自制 bồn), but the lore doesn't actively shape the scene's events. Cường could be asking anyone for help in any location — the tunnel setting adds atmosphere but doesn't create obstacles or opportunities specific to the world's rules.
lore_integration.fix: Have Cường notice something in the tunnel that connects to his situation — a bồn triệt giác where someone's body shows the same kind of chest mark he has, or a Du Mục who's further gone than he is, mumbling a name they've forgotten. This would make the world's rules (bilateral sync, memory overwrite) visible in the environment rather than just in Cường's internal narration.
lore_integration.note: The ping readouts and temperature tracking integrate the magic system's rules naturally. The concept of 'nhiễu' as the experience of failed memory-retrieval is a good extension of the established vocabulary. The weakest integration is in the tunnel — it's atmospheric but could do more to show the system's consequences on other bodies.

engagement.weakest_moment: The extended sequence of Cường sitting in the dark hầm, repeatedly trying and failing to remember Lan, with multiple paragraphs of 'Nhiễu. Màn hình tivi mất tín hiệu. Hạt đen trắng.' This repetition doesn't escalate — each failure feels the same as the last.
engagement.fix: Vary the memory-failure attempts. First attempt: pure static. Second attempt: a wrong memory intrudes (Phố Hoa Sữa, the virtual lover's face). Third attempt: a flash of something real — a hand, a smell, a sound — that vanishes before he can grasp it. This creates escalation and makes the reader feel the loss differently each time.
engagement.note: The Bảo scene is engaging — specific, tense, with good dialogue. The discovery of the paper is a strong hook. But the chapter sags in its second half, with too much time spent on Cường's repetitive internal attempts to remember. The final paragraphs, where the prose explains what the paper means and what Cường has decided to do, kill the tension rather than building it. A better ending would cut before the explanation, leaving the reader with the image of Cường in the dark, the paper on the desk, the ping still reading 14ms.

three_weakest_sentences: Và Cường — kẻ đã quên tên con đường mình sống, quên mùa hiện tại, quên lý do trốn chạy — lần đầu tiên nắm giữ một mảnh vỡ ký ức thật sự.
Mảnh giấy là cầu nối. Giữa những gì anh từng biết và những gì anh đã mất. Giữa thế giới thực và... thứ gì đó khác.

Cường ngồi trong bóng tối và chờ. Chờ bình minh. Chờ câu hỏi tiếp theo. Chờ khoảnh khắc anh đủ can đảm để đứng lên, bước ra khỏi hầm, đi 1.2 km đến bệnh viện, và đối mặt với người mà anh đã biến thành công cụ.
three_strongest_sentences: Bảo nheo mắt phải. Tay trái anh ta bấm liên tục vào ngón cái, nhịp đều như đồng hồ đo nhịp tim.
Tao thấy nó. Mỗi đêm. Trong góc mắt mù. Nó đứng đó. Không nhúc nhích. Không chớp mắt. Tao không đổ bộ sáu năm rồi, Cường. Sáu năm. Nó vẫn nhớ tao.
Giấy cũ. Mực cũ. Không có ozon. Không có hoa sữa. Chỉ có giấy và mực và thời gian.
ai_patterns_detected: Paragraph structure repetition: Multiple paragraphs in the second half follow the same pattern (short statement → elaboration → emotional conclusion).
Over-explanation of symbolic significance: The chapter tells the reader what the paper means rather than letting the object speak for itself.
Symmetrical construction: The 'Chờ bình minh. Chờ câu hỏi tiếp theo. Chờ khoảnh khắc...' triplet is a classic AI rhetorical pattern — three parallel phrases building to a resolution.
Uniform sentence rhythm in the hầm section: After the Bảo scene, sentence variety decreases noticeably.
Telling emotion at the climax: 'lần đầu tiên nắm giữ một mảnh vỡ ký ức thật sự' is the kind of emotional summary AI defaults to instead of trusting the scene.
top_3_revisions: Cut the final 8 paragraphs (from 'Cường đứng dậy. Tắt đèn LED...' to the end). Replace with: Cường tắt đèn. Trong bóng tối, anh ngồi xuống sàn. Mảnh giấy trên bàn — anh không nhìn thấy nữa, nhưng biết nó ở đó. Ping: 14ms. Nhịp 54. Cô vẫn đập trong lồng ngực anh. Lan. Anh không nhớ. Nhưng lần đầu tiên, anh biết mình đã quên. End chapter there — no explanation, no declaration of intent.

Vary the memory-failure sequences. Currently, Cường tries to remember Lan three times and each time gets 'nhiễu.' Make each attempt different: (1) pure static, (2) a wrong memory intrudes (Kẻ Đuổi's face appears instead), (3) a fragment of something real — a hand, a voice saying a word that isn't 'Lan' — that vanishes. This creates escalation.

Tighten Bảo's dialogue to match his character profile more closely. Break his longer speeches into shorter, interrupted fragments. Add more physical beats (xoa thái dương, bấm ngón tay) between his lines to show the effort of speaking. Remove any line that sounds like exposition ('Mày đến đây, giữa đêm, đi một km rưỡi dưới đất, qua chỗ toàn người chết và người sắp chết, để hỏi tao cách xóa một thứ mà tao đã mất bảy mươi phần trăm mắt để né tránh') — Bảo wouldn't explain himself this clearly.
new_canon_entries: Cường has a cardboard box in the corner of the hầm containing old clothes, spare cables, equipment packaging, and faded receipts.
Cường once wrote down the note 'Lan. Phòng 4. St. Vincent.' in his own handwriting, on blue ink, folded into quarters. He has no memory of writing it.
Bảo has not had contact with Cường for an unspecified period before this encounter.
Bảo still experiences visual phenomena in his blind eye — he sees 'it' standing still, not blinking, every night.
The name of Bệnh nhân 04-ĐM may be Lan (to be confirmed or denied in future chapters).
